changeSet.author: monica
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO service (service_name, price) VALUES ('Breakfast', 15.00), ('Lunch', 25.00), ('Dinner', 30.00), ('Spa', 80.00), ('Laundry', 12.00), ('Transportation', 40.00), ('Minibar', 20.00), ('Gym Access', 10.00), ('Pool Access', 0.00), ('Room Service', 18.00);

changeSet.author: monica
monica
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO customer (name, email) SELECT 'Customer ' || i, 'customer' || i || '@example.com' FROM generate_series(1, 10000) AS s(i);

changeSet.author: monica
monica
